description_long: This is a white ceramic vase with a rounded body and a slightly flared rim, featuring a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The exterior is adorned with intricate blue floral motifs, reminiscent of traditional East Asian porcelain, with large blossoms and delicate stems wrapping around the surface. The handle is smoothly integrated into the body, curving gracefully from the rim to the midsection. The vase has a wide opening, making it suitable for holding flowers or decorative arrangements. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible signs of wear, chips, or cracks, indicating it is in excellent condition.
description: A white ceramic vase with blue floral motifs and a single curved handle, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a wide opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main blue floral design on the rounded white body, with the rim and opening clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the handle on the right side and more of the floral pattern wrapping around the vase.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the handle, with only a small portion of the blue motif visible near the base.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the handle's attachment and the continuation of the blue floral design across the surface.
attribute_location: urban park bench or public plaza table
